name: canvas-navigated-updates-active-stack-item
description: Client emits a `canvas_navigated` WS message (Clientâ†’Server) carrying `{sessionId, previousActiveItemId, activeItemId}`. Server updates `Session.activeStackItemId` to `activeItemId` (or null when the user popped to empty). Subsequent `ggui_consume` calls observe the new active pipe. Payload omits `appId` â€” the subscriber binding is the authoritative scope; an inbound message scoped to a wrong session is rejected with `SESSION_MISMATCH` rather than implicit reroute.

expectedBehavior.reason: canvas_navigated has no synchronous response envelope â€” the side effect is a Session field mutation observed via subsequent ggui_consume / handshake output.
